incident_summary: During operator-surface voice transcription wiring, a new Harmonia bearer token was generated and uploaded as a Cloudflare Worker secret when the intended work was local credential binding. This may have rotated the remote Worker secret and invalidated prior clients.

repair_surface.preflight_command: narada capability credential-preflight --site <site> --principal <principal> --kind voice.transcription.remote --operation bind_existing_secret --credential-ref env:HARMONIA_VOICE_TRANSCRIPTION_TOKEN
repair_surface.rotation_preflight_command: narada capability credential-preflight --site <site> --principal <principal> --kind voice.transcription.remote --operation rotate_remote_secret --remote-worker harmonia-voice-transcription --remote-secret-name TRANSCRIPTION_BEARER_TOKEN --approve-remote-secret-mutation
